title: SuperEnchants
description: Custom enchant levels, combine illegal enchants & much more. All server-side.
body:
[](https://modrinth.com/mod/dacl) This completely server-side mod changes some enchanting mechanics. It is fully customizable through the config.

Features

Enchanting Unnerf
  • Bow enchants unnerf: Allows you to combine Mending and Infinity on Bows.
  • Crossbow enchants unnerf: Allows you to combine Piercing and Multishot on Crossbows.
  • Armor enchants unnerf: Allows you to combine Protection, Projectile Protection, Fire Protection and Blast Protection on armor pieces.
  • Weapon enchants unnerf: Allows you to combine Sharpness, Smite and Bane of Arthropods on weapons.
  • Mace enchants unnerf: Allows you to combine Density, Breach, Bane of Arthropods and Smite on Maces
Trident Enhancements
  • Channeling 2: Adds a level 2 version of the Channeling enchant that allows players to strike lightning even when it's not thundering.
  • Loyalty void protection: Prevents Tridents from being destroyed when thrown in the void when enchanted with Loyalty.
  • Tridents return to same slot: Makes tridents always return to the slot they were thrown from if possible.
Enchant Tweaks
  • No Soul Speed damage: Makes boots enchanted with Soul Speed no longer take damage when walking on Soul Sand or Soul Soil.
  • No Thorns damage: Makes armor pieces enchanted with Thorns no longer take damage when damaging other entities.
  • Infinity without Arrows: Allows using the Infinity enchant without having an Arrow in your inventory.
  • Infinity on Crossbows: Allows putting the Infinity enchant on Crossbows.
  • Only best villager trades: Makes all villagers only get max level enchanted books for the cheapest vanilla price. This option is disabled by default.
  • No prior work penalty: Disables the item work penalty so the level required to enchant an item using an Anvil doesn't increase when enchanting multiple times.
  • Custom enchantment levels: Allows higher levels of vanilla enchants. The levels are customizable in the config file.
  • Custom levels in loot table: Makes the custom levels appear in Enchanting Tables, Villager trades & Chest loot. This option is disabled by default, to keep gameplay balanced it's recommended to turn off no prior work penalty.
  • Max anvil cost: Sets the maximum amount of levels the repair cost in an anvil can be. Set to -1 (default) to disable.
All features can be turned on/off in the config file. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
